# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Let users quickly generate a good-looking QR code for their hosted page without leaving the project editor.

## Success Criteria

- The project page includes a dedicated QR section.
- Users can preview a QR code for the current project slug.
- Users can adjust color and choose between a few style presets.
- Users can download the generated QR code.

## UX Notes

- Keep the section visually distinct but aligned with the rest of the settings page.
- Preview should update quickly and feel trustworthy.
- The controls should stay simple enough for non-technical users.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Library choice should not drag in unnecessary complexity or backend persistence.
